intent: Wide 2-bedroom with great room on the LEFT (combined living+dining), a central horizontal hallway band, master + kitchen stacked in the middle column (master front, kitchen rear), and standard bedroom + common T&B stacked in the right column (standard front, common rear). Single T&B. Targeted at 16x10 / 16x11 wide lots.
must_haves: great room on the LEFT column, full depth
master bedroom in middle column at the FRONT
kitchen in middle column at the REAR (above master)
standard bedroom in right column at the FRONT
common T&B in right column at the REAR (above standard)
single horizontal hallway band across middle + right columns between bedrooms and kitchen/bath
